title: 宝塚記念の後に・ガラスの天井

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is this?! I've been bested?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto goes full throttle, securing a win and
stealing the show from T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What explosive energy... far beyond what I had
imagined. Doto, you...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I was just so happy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I was so happy after hearing you waited for me,
so I gave it my very best!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, so... how was it, Opera O? Did you see me
shine?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haha, wh-why of course, you shined bright.
Second best to me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Although, I would say you've yet to reach your
full splendor.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, o-okay. I'll put in more effort in my next race
then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Next will be the autumn Tenno Sho! I'll talk with
my trainer about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice a familiar face in the stands, watching the
duo intently. I make my way over.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph, it's you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Those two have truly reached their full potential.
Don't you think so, after seeing today's race?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. But reaching your full potential isn't all
sunshine and rainbows. There's nowhere up after
that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Doto took the gold today, but from what I saw...
Opera O's max stats are slightly higher.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If they keep competing with each other, you'll
see. The margin Doto'll lose by will be small, but
she won't be able to close the gap.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh Spe, isn't it a wonderful day?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It sure is, Grass! That race was honestly something
else.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I have to agree. All this time, the younger
generation had been so hard at work. I suppose
it's too early to think about retiring.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Let's pray for the best—to see them once more at
the year-end Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In the meantime, I'll steel my body and mind. My
sharpened skills will put even the finest blades to
shame.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You're s-scaring me a little, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I get where you're coming from! Doto and
Opera O are really good, so we'll have to be even
better!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There are some crazy runners out there—with
stats so damn high, I can't get a read on them.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's why they call them the Ultimate
Generation. Even I'm unsure what they're capable
of.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Doto's in for a lot of pain. She'll be stuck up
against the ceiling, struggling to push past it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's talking about stat ceilings again, but does a
limit like that really exist?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race will be the autumn Tenno Sho. We
need to have a working strategy by then, if her
words prove to be true.
